refactorCandidate.reason: Largest component in codebase. Original refactor candidates (VoiceRecorder, LessonMode, GrammarMode, etc.) have all been refactored to <200 lines.

notes: Hooks are well-covered (useAudioPlayer, useFurigana, useChatSession all have tests). Only untested hook is useKanjiKeyboardShortcuts. Next component priorities after JapanesePhrase: VoiceRecorder, HighlightedText.
